anti_claims: The work-landing control spine is copied control-plane source for inspection and validation, not live Git, Task Ledger, or Work Ledger mutation authority.
The public bundle does not authorize claim release, broad staging, private-index commit execution, provider calls, credential export, publication, hosting, or release.
source_authority_ref: microcosm-substrate/AXIOMS.md#1 (JSON is contract; Markdown is projection)
validation_rules: validate required source refs or target refs remain public-safe
preserve draft/staged status until an active v2 acceptance lane supplies validator and receipt evidence
reject release, provider dispatch, source mutation, private-root equivalence, and whole-system correctness claims
receipt_expectations: record validator command and result when an admitting validator exists
do not place source bodies, private paths, credentials, provider payloads, or operator thread content in receipts
anti_claim: The work-landing control spine is copied control-plane source for inspection and validation, not live Git, Task Ledger, or Work Ledger mutation authority.

author.purpose: create a valid Work landing control spine instance

refine_instance.purpose: improve an existing Work landing control spine without corrupting authority

refine_standard_and_propagate.purpose: change std_microcosm_work_landing_control_spine and propagate through governed artifacts plus generated lattice projections

doctrine_kind_envelope.note: This standard conforms to the universal doctrine-kind envelope; markdown, Mermaid, Atlas, coverage, health, and entry-card views are generated projections of this JSON source.

contract_projection_basis.authority_boundary: computed standard-lattice contract only; existing authority_ceiling remains the operative claim ceiling.

refinement_provenance.method: additive_v2_contract_envelope; required_fields, authority_ceiling, anti_claims, relationships, validators, receipts, and public_private_boundary preserved; no runtime acceptance, release, or source-body authority added

selective.rule: relationships.used_by_organs declares route pressure only; it does not accept missing organs or prove runtime use

lattice_edges.authority_boundary: declared contract topology only; generated relation coverage remains computed by build_doctrine_projection.py

field_semantics.id: stable work_landing_control_spine instance id when present in governed instances
field_semantics.authority_boundary: states the highest supported authority for the instance
field_semantics.source_refs: names source evidence without copying private source bodies
field_semantics.status: explicit lifecycle state; not release or completeness authority
field_semantics.relationships: typed source-declared edges or residual pressure, never inferred proof
field_semantics.omission_receipt: records omitted bodies and drilldown refs for compressed/generated views
field_semantics.anti_claims: states what the instance does not prove or authorize

instance_schema.note: Required keys are projected from this standard source required_fields list; schema validation remains validator-owned.

schema_check.rule: instance validates against required_fields and this standard contract

source_boundary.rule: public instances cite source_refs and preserve public_private_boundary; private/raw/provider bodies are not exported

link_resolution.rule: required lattice edge targets resolve to governed instance ids; selective unresolved targets remain typed residual pressure

projection_freshness.rule: generated markdown, Mermaid, Atlas, coverage, health, and entry-card views are regenerable from JSON source; stale projection is a trust downgrade, not source authority

atlas_card.surface: agent entry / doctrine lattice projection / atlas card
atlas_card.note: agent-routing projection; must link back to JSON source

coverage_health.note: computed health; never evidence for source claims

compression.rule: preserve authority boundary and anti-claim before any status/count summary
compression.purpose: keep standard-governed instance rows navigable without turning projection counts into readiness claims
